heading: Reimbursement of fire funds
label: 1856e Reimbursement of fire funds

Definition of “Secretary”“Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture, see , Agriculture.section 9001 of Title 7
amendments: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Agricultural Act of 2014, and not as part of act , which comprises this subchapter.May 27, 1955Section is comprised of . Subsec. (f) of amended .section 8304 of Pub. L. 113–79section 8304 of Pub. L. 113–79section 1856d of this title

children.text: may accept the reimbursement amounts from the other State; and
shall pay those amounts to the State seeking reimbursement.

children.heading: Mutual assistance agreement
children.label: c Mutual assistance agreement
children.text: As a condition of seeking and providing reimbursement under subsection (b), the State seeking reimbursement and the State providing reimbursement must each have a mutual assistance agreement with the Forest Service or another Federal agency for providing and receiving wildfire management and suppression resources and services.

children.heading: Terms and conditions
children.label: d Terms and conditions
children.text: The Secretary may prescribe the terms and conditions determined to be necessary to carry out subsection (b).

children.heading: Effect on prior reimbursements
children.label: e Effect on prior reimbursements
children.text: Any acceptance of funds or reimbursements made by the Secretary before , that otherwise would have been authorized under this section shall be considered to have been made in accordance with this section.February 7, 2014
